component.name: ActivationCheckTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "run" end sub
sub run() m.top.channelsJson = "" m.top.errorMessage = ""
apiBase = m.top.apiBase deviceCode = m.top.deviceCode
if apiBase = invalid or apiBase = "" or deviceCode = invalid or deviceCode = "" then m.top.errorMessage = "Missing activation settings." return end if
activationTransfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") activationTransfer.SetUrl(apiBase + "/api/activate/" + deviceCode)
activationResponse = activationTransfer.GetToString() if activationResponse = invalid or activationResponse = "" then m.top.errorMessage = "No response from server." return end if
activationData = ParseJson(activationResponse) if activationData = invalid or activationData.ok <> true or activationData.activation = invalid then m.top.errorMessage = "Not activated yet." return end if
activation = activationData.activation
payload = { nickname: aaString(activation, "nickname") setupType: aaString(activation, "setupType") host: aaString(activation, "serverUrl") username: aaString(activation, "username") password: aaString(activation, "password") m3uUrl: aaString(activation, "playlistUrl") epgUrl: aaString(activation, "epgUrl") forceRefresh: true }
channelTransfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") channelTransfer.SetUrl(apiBase + "/api/channels") channelTransfer.AddHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
channelResponse = channelTransfer.PostFromString(FormatJson(payload)) if channelResponse = invalid or channelResponse = "" then m.top.errorMessage = "No channels returned." return end if
m.top.channelsJson = channelResponse end sub
function aaString(obj as Dynamic, key as String) as String if obj = invalid then return "" val = obj.Lookup(key) if val = invalid then return "" return val end function
